assertions.title: Path stroke rendering (stroke_width > 0, fill=transparent → outlined shape)

steps.expected: Test verifies stroke pixels present on edges and empty interior for transparent fill
steps.observed: Test creates a triangle with fill=TRANSPARENT and blue stroke (width=3). Asserts bottom edge pixel (50,89) has b>100 (blue stroke visible), and interior (50,50) has r<50,g<50,b<50 (no fill, dark interior). Correctly verifies the assertion's claimed property.

assertions.title: Path with both fill and stroke (fill first, stroke on top)

steps.expected: Test verifies fill renders in interior and stroke renders on edges, proving layering order
steps.observed: Test creates triangle with red fill and blue stroke (width=3). Asserts interior pixel (50,50) r>200 (red fill visible) and edge pixel (50,79) b>50 (blue stroke visible on top of fill). Correctly verifies fill-first, stroke-on-top layering.

assertions.title: Empty and degenerate paths handled gracefully (zero commands, only MoveTo, LineTo without MoveTo)

steps.expected: All three degenerate cases tested: empty path (no commands), MoveTo-only, LineTo-without-MoveTo
steps.observed: Three separate tests: (1) empty path (0 cmds) with red fill — verifies framebuffer untouched at (50,50)=black. (2) Single MoveTo(50,50) — framebuffer untouched. (3) LineTo without preceding MoveTo — no crash, implicit moveto at (0,0). All three verify no crash and no stray pixels.

assertions.title: Path rendering respects node clipping (path beyond node bounds clipped by parent clips_children)

steps.expected: Test verifies path extending beyond clip parent is properly clipped
steps.observed: Test creates a 100×100 path fill rect inside a 50×50 parent with CLIPS_CHILDREN. Verifies pixel (25,25) inside parent is red (r>200), and pixel (75,75) outside parent is black (r<10,g<10,b<10). Correctly demonstrates clipping of path geometry beyond parent bounds.

assertions.title: Rounded rect border follows corner contour (arc, not straight lines)

steps.expected: Test verifies border pixels follow arc at corners, not straight-line segments
steps.observed: Test creates 80×60 node with corner_radius=12, border width=3, red border color over gray background. Asserts: (1) top-center border pixel (40,1) is red (border present on straight edge). (2) Interior (40,30) is background color (50,50,50). (3) Corner pixel (0,0) is NOT red — proving border follows the arc and doesn't extend to sharp corner. This correctly verifies the contour-following behavior.

assertions.title: Visual primitives work at fractional scale (rounded rects, AA lines, paths at scale 1.5)

steps.expected: Test verifies rounded rect with corner_radius renders correctly at scale 1.5
steps.observed: Test creates 80×60 node with corner_radius=8, blue background at scale 1.5. Physical framebuffer is 120×90. Verifies: (1) interior pixel (60,45) is blue. (2) Corner (0,0) is NOT blue (outside physical arc at radius round(8*1.5)=12). (3) Pixel (12,12) IS blue (inside physical arc). Correctly verifies fractional scale rendering of rounded rects.

assertions.title: Fractional scale preserves rounded corner symmetry (corner_radius=8 at scale 1.5, all four corners identical)

steps.expected: Test samples all four corners and asserts they match
steps.observed: Test creates 60×60 node with corner_radius=10 at scale 1.5 (physical 90×90, physical radius=15). Samples pixel at offset (1,1) from each corner: top-left (1,1), top-right (88,1), bottom-left (1,88), bottom-right (88,88). Asserts all four corner pixel values are identical (tl==tr==bl==br). Correctly verifies corner symmetry at fractional scale.

assertions.title: Node size compile-time assertion (const assert on size_of::<Node>() in scene/lib.rs)

steps.expected: All tests pass (exit code 0) — compilation succeeds, proving compile-time assertion holds
steps.observed: All tests pass, exit code 0. Compilation succeeds.
Line 310: `const _: () = assert!(core::mem::size_of::<Node>() == 60);` — compile-time assertion present and verified.

steps.expected: Runtime test also verifies Node is exactly 60 bytes
steps.observed: Test asserts `core::mem::size_of::<Node>() == 60` at runtime, complementing the compile-time const assertion in scene/lib.rs. Both mechanisms prevent silent shared-memory layout drift.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: all 8 passed. Full test suite (1500+ tests across 58 files) passes with 0 failures. All 10 specific mapped tests pass individually. Compile-time Node size assertion confirmed at scene/lib.rs:310. Test source code reviewed for each assertion — all tests verify the exact properties claimed in the validation contract.
